title: Turtle
description: True to their graceful nature, this Easter jelly glides effortlessly across the skin leaving light apple-y suds in its wake. Turtle-y awesome!
ingredients: Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Bark Oil (Cinnamon Bark Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Amara Twig/Leaf Oil (Petitgrain Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Amara Flower Oil (Neroli Oil)

images.alt: Easter Turtle. A fun, turtle-shaped shower jelly with bright green and yellow colours. Complete with an embossed shell design on top.

The image shows a vibrant lime-green "Easter Turtle" shower jelly shaped like a sea turtle sitting on a white shower ledge. The turtle is surrounded by a light layer of white soap suds against a backdrop of pale green wall tiles.

The image shows a vibrant lime-green and yellow shower jelly soap shaped like a sea turtle held in a person's cupped palms. The turtle is being rinsed under falling water in a shower against a backdrop of pale green tiles.

The image shows the vibrant lime-green "Easter Turtle" shower jelly, shaped like a sea turtle, being rubbed onto a person's soapy forearm in the shower. Water falls in the background against pale green tiles.

The image shows the vibrant lime-green "Easter Turtle" shower jelly, shaped like a sea turtle, being rubbed onto a person's soapy forearm in the shower. Water falls in the background against pale green tiles.
